title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Lack of Access Controls
description: The absence of data classification details makes it impossible to determine the sensitivity of the data handled by the ‘csa’ system. Without knowing what data is considered confidential, it’s difficult to implement appropriate access controls. This could lead to unauthorized disclosure of sensitive information if users have excessive permissions or if vulnerabilities exist in the system’s access control mechanisms.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to data due to insufficient or misconfigured access controls.
mitigations: Implement a data classification scheme to categorize data based on sensitivity.
Apply the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary access rights.
Regularly review and update access controls to ensure they remain appropriate.
